summary: Phase 3 Deferred Slice 2 implements a deterministic shared explosion style catalog with three styles (burst, sparkle, nova), each with stable ids, labels, and particle config metadata. Pure helper functions provide safe fallback and deterministic config resolution. Integration is minimal: the renderer onExplode handler receives a styleId and resolves config via resolveExplosionConfig, the main process context menu exposes an Explosion Style submenu, and preload forwards the styleId. 118 tests pass, typecheck and build succeed, and no forbidden Phase 3 backlog features are present.
evidence: src/renderer/explosionStyles.ts exports EXPLOSION_STYLES with 3 styles, getExplosionStyleById(), and resolveExplosionConfig()
src/renderer/explosionStyles.test.ts has 4 tests covering stable ids, labels/metadata, fallback, and deterministic config resolution
src/App.tsx receives styleId in onExplode and calls resolveExplosionConfig() before createExplosion()
src/main.ts exposes an Explosion Style submenu with all three choices and sends menu:explode with style.id
src/preload.ts forwards styleId through the onExplode callback
manual_verification_required: Right-click pet menu shows at least two explosion style choices
Selecting different explosion style choices produces visibly different particle bursts
No sound, hotkey, plugin, import/export, upload, notification, backend, or cloud behavior is present
next_maker_instruction: No next maker iteration needed. Do not advance to another Phase 3 backlog item until the human manual gate is approved.
